chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.S-86 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of C.M.A No.2461/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.12.2025. ***************************************** This matter is part-heard and was fixed on 26.12.2025, when counsel for Appellant was called absent, however, Mr. Kazim Abbas, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Almani, Advocate for Appellant was specifically directed to inform the latter for today’s date with a note of caution that in case of non-appearance, the matter will be decided based on the documents. Today, once again the matter is called but neither the learned counsel for Appellant is present nor there is any intimation. For reasons to be recorded later on, the instant 1st Appeal is dismissed with no order as to costs. JUDGE Ali.
